zh: 新生兒來臨、家裡難免會有變化、
en: The arrival of a new baby brings inevitable changes to the home,

zh: 但要儘量避免在這時候給大孩子很大的生活變化、
en: but try to avoid making big changes for the elder child at the same time.

zh: 例如小弟弟妹妹一來你讓他上幼兒園或自己睡、
en: For example, starting preschool or sleeping alone right when the sibling arrives

zh: 都容易讓他小小的心靈聯想到他不重要、
en: can easily make their young heart feel they no longer matter,
or that no one loves them anymore.
